title: Ticket 08 - Interfaces & documentation
description: Dummy data for ticket 08 - interfaces & documentation (V01) in the DoomScrollQuiz.

questions.prompt: In ticket 08 the key statement appears: "Classify and apply training-company interfaces and documentation safely in daily work." What did he say?

options.text: We should clearly understand training-company interfaces and documentation in daily work and implement it cleanly.
options.explanation: This summarizes the core idea of training-company interfaces and documentation in a direct, practical way.

options.text: We can ignore training-company interfaces and documentation as long as there is no time pressure.
options.explanation: Training-company interfaces and documentation should not be postponed or ignored.

options.text: Only the team lead is allowed to deal with training-company interfaces and documentation.
options.explanation: This makes the topic unnecessarily exclusive and misses the learning idea.

options.text: Training-company interfaces and documentation only becomes relevant after the project ends.
options.explanation: The learning idea should be applied during ongoing daily work.

questions.prompt: Which reaction best fits ticket 08 regarding training-company interfaces and documentation?

options.text: Align briefly, document cleanly, and make the next step clear.
options.explanation: This combines clarification, transparency, and actionable implementation.

options.text: Write nothing down at first and decide later by feel.
options.explanation: For training-company interfaces and documentation this would be imprecise and risky.

options.text: Only raise problems once they are fully escalated.
options.explanation: The right direction is to clarify early instead of escalating late.

options.text: Avoid questions even if the goal is still unclear.
options.explanation: The learning idea requires clarity, not silent guessing.
